sourcesContent:
import { STUDIO } from "../data/photos"; import "./About.css"; export default function About() { return (

Our Story

Twelve years of
capturing joy

Ayyan Studio was founded in 2012 with one simple belief — every Indian celebration carries a magic that deserves to be preserved forever. From the sacred rituals of a Tamil Brahmin wedding to the joyful chaos of a first birthday party, we have been there, camera in hand, heart fully present.

Our team of 8 photographers brings together traditional sensibility and modern artistry. We understand the significance of every moment — the exchange of garlands, the first look, the grandparents' tears, the children dancing. We don't just photograph; we witness.

{["South Indian Weddings", "Candid Specialist", "DSLR & Cinema", "Drone Coverage"].map(b => ( {b} ))}

Contact & Address

Reach Ayyan Studio

For bookings, enquiries or studio visits, connect with our team today. We are based in Chennai and available for studio sessions, event coverage, and surprise celebrations across South India.

Studio location

{STUDIO.location}

Phone {STUDIO.phone}
Email {STUDIO.email}
Instagram {STUDIO.instagram}
); }
